failed_rules.message: LoanType must be Closed End Second for 2nd Lien program
US Citizens are not eligible for Select ITIN program.
Loan amount $328,800 below minimum requirement $3,500,001
FICO Score score 715 below minimum requirement 720
FICO Score score 715 below minimum 720 required for Primary Residence, SFR
Income Doc Type "1099: 12 Mo." is not a DSCR type - Investor DSCR requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Occupancy 'Primary Residence' not eligible for Foreign National. Available: Investment Property, Second Home
US Citizens are not eligible for Foreign National program - FAIL
Income Doc Type "1099: 12 Mo." is not a DSCR type - DSCR Supreme Program requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Income Doc Type "1099: 12 Mo." is not a DSCR type - DSCR Multi (5-8 Units) requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL
Income Doc Type "1099: 12 Mo." is not a DSCR type - Investor DSCR No Ratio requires a DSCR income documentation type - FAIL

income: RATIOS AND QUALIFYING – FULL AND ALT DOC

specifications: Must be current and unexpired government-issued photo identification
Must match borrower name on loan application exactly
Must be clear and legible copy or scan

reasons_needed.reason: Required for borrower identity verification per lending regulations
Confirms borrower identity for loan application and document execution

document_requests.document_subtype: Request for Transcript of Tax Return
specifications: Must be fully executed and signed by borrower
Must authorize tax transcript request for most recent 2 tax years
Must match borrower name and SSN exactly as on loan application
Must include current address and property address if different

reasons_needed.reason: Required per full documentation guidelines for income verification
Enables third-party verification of tax returns for 1099 income documentation

specifications: Must be fully executed by all parties (buyer and seller)
Must show purchase price of $411,000 matching loan scenario
Must identify subject property at correct address
Must include all addenda and amendments
Must show earnest money deposit and financing contingencies

reasons_needed.reason: Required for purchase transactions to verify purchase price and terms
Confirms loan amount and LTV calculations based on purchase price
Establishes transaction timeline and contingencies for underwriting

specifications: Must clearly state property will be used as investment/rental property
Must be signed and dated by borrower
Must match occupancy type used for loan qualification
Must address any future occupancy intentions

reasons_needed.reason: Investment property occupancy affects LTV limits, reserve requirements, and program eligibility
Required to confirm occupancy classification for loan pricing and documentation standards

specifications: Must be complete signed tax returns for the most recent 2 tax years (2023 and 2024 if available, or 2022 and 2023)
Must include all pages and schedules
Must show borrower's name and signature
Must include Schedule C if self-employed income reported
Must include Schedule E if rental income reported
Must be signed and dated by borrower
Must reconcile to 1003 income declaration for 1099 income
reasons_needed: 1099 income qualification requires historical tax return verification per Full Documentation guidelines
Two years of tax returns needed to establish income stability and continuity
Self-employed or 1099 income must be verified through tax returns showing consistent earnings
Required to calculate qualifying income using historical average or declining income method

specifications: Must be most recent year's 1099 forms from all income sources
Must show borrower's name and SSN
Must show payer information
Must show income amounts reported
Must reconcile to tax return Schedule C or other income schedules
Must support 1099 income declared on 1003 application
reasons_needed: 1099 income must be verified with actual 1099 forms received from payers
Required to validate income sources and amounts reported on tax returns
Supports continuity of 1099 income relationships
Verifies accuracy of income reporting for qualifying calculations

specifications: Must be current year-to-date through most recent month
Must be signed and dated by borrower
Must show business name if applicable
Must show gross income and business expenses
Must show net income calculation
Must be prepared in standard P&L format
Must demonstrate income trend compared to prior year tax returns
reasons_needed: YTD P&L required to assess current year income performance for 1099/self-employed borrowers
Needed to identify any significant changes in income trend from prior tax years
Required to project current year qualifying income
Supports income stability analysis for underwriting decision

document_requests.specific_accounts: All depository accounts used for funds to close
specifications: Must show borrower name as account holder
Must show financial institution name and address
Must show account number or masked account identifier
Must show beginning and ending balances for statement period
Must show complete transaction history
Must include all pages including signature/authentication page
Must be dated within 90 days of note date
Must demonstrate sufficient funds for down payment of $82,200 and estimated closing costs
Must verify any large deposits requiring source documentation
reasons_needed: Assets must be verified for funds to close per NQMF guidelines
Down payment of $82,200 (20% of $411,000 purchase price) must be sourced from verified accounts
Closing costs and prepaid items must be covered by verified liquid assets
Account ownership must be confirmed to borrower
Large deposits may require additional sourcing documentation
Asset documentation must be dated within 90 days of note date per guidelines
document_requests.guideline_reference: ASSETS section - funds must evidence sufficient amounts from acceptable sources for down payment, closing costs, prepaid items

specifications: Must show EMD amount and date of deposit
Must identify recipient (listing agent, escrow company, or attorney)
Must show source of EMD funds from borrower's verified account
Must include copy of canceled check, wire confirmation, or deposit receipt
Must verify EMD amount will be credited toward purchase price at closing
reasons_needed: Purchase transaction requires verification of earnest money deposit
EMD reduces cash required at closing and must be documented
Source of EMD must be from borrower's verified assets
EMD amount affects final cash to close calculation
document_requests.guideline_reference: ASSETS section - all funds for transaction must be from acceptable sources

specifications: Must be complete tri-merge or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR)
Must identify all borrowers on the loan
Must show credit scores from all three major bureaus (Experian, TransUnion, Equifax)
Must show tradeline details with payment history
Must show inquiries, public records, disputes, collections, charge-offs, and alerts
Must be dated within allowed recency window
Must include verification of all credit references provided on loan application
Must certify results of public record searches for each city where borrower has resided in last 2 years
Valid Social Security number required for all borrowers (exception for ITIN and Foreign National Borrowers)
reasons_needed: Credit score (715 FICO) is required to validate Flex Supreme program eligibility
Tradeline and credit history requirements must be reviewed to ensure borrower meets standard tradeline requirements (3 tradelines 12+ months OR 2 tradelines 24+ months)
Credit report is needed to identify any credit events, inquiries, disputes, and mortgage history
Required by NQMF guidelines for all borrowers on the loan
Needed to verify no significant credit events that would affect eligibility
document_requests.source_guideline: CREDIT REPORT section - tri-merge or RMCR required for all borrowers

specifications: Must identify borrower Veronica Marie Montes as vested party
Must identify subject property at 123 Oak Street, Los Angeles, CA
Must include complete legal description
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, exceptions, and title requirements
Must show title insurer name and effective date within acceptable recency window
Must confirm clear title or identify all encumbrances requiring resolution
Final vesting must reflect borrower name per NQMF guidelines
reasons_needed: Title must confirm Veronica Montes' ownership and insurable interest in subject property
Underwriter must review all title exceptions and lien position before loan approval
Required to verify property legal description matches loan application
Essential for determining closing conditions and title insurance requirements

specifications: Must show current ownership of 123 Oak Street, Los Angeles, CA property
Must identify grantor and grantee in chain of title
Must include legal description matching title commitment
Must be properly recorded with county recorder
Must confirm vesting aligns with borrower Veronica Marie Montes
Must be dated and notarized per state requirements
reasons_needed: Required to confirm property ownership and verify borrower has legal interest
Essential for underwriter to validate vesting matches loan application
Needed to establish chain of title for property being pledged as collateral

STEP_00.summary: Successfully parsed loan file, documents, and eligibility data. Loan profile shows Veronica Marie Montes purchasing a SFR in CA for $411,000 with $328,800 loan amount (80% LTV), 715 FICO, qualifying for Flex Supreme program with 1099 income. Nine submitted documents were parsed and routed to facets including purchase contract, bank statement, 1099, paystub, and compliance forms. No contradictions detected. Core scenario elements are complete.

STEP_01.summary: Generated 4 cross-cutting document requests for basic loan requirements. Identified need for government-issued photo ID for identity verification, IRS Form 4506-C for tax transcript authorization as required by full documentation guidelines, purchase contract to verify transaction details and purchase price, and occupancy certification for investment property classification. No overlay conflicts detected as no overlays were provided in the loan file.

STEP_02.summary: Generated 3 income document requests for 1099 borrower Veronica Montes. Required 2 years of tax returns (1040 with all schedules) to establish income history and stability, current year 1099 forms to verify income sources and amounts, and year-to-date P&L statement to assess current year performance and income trends. All requests align with Full Documentation guidelines requiring historical verification of 1099/self-employed income through tax returns and current year income validation.

Must include all pages and schedules
Must show borrower's name and signature
Must include Schedule C if self-employed income reported

Must be signed and dated by borrower
Must reconcile to 1003 income declaration for 1099 income

STEP_03.summary: Generated 2 asset document requests for purchase transaction. Required personal bank statements (2 months) to verify funds to close including $82,200 down payment and closing costs, with specifications for account ownership verification and large deposit identification. Also required earnest money deposit verification to document EMD source and credit toward purchase price.

STEP_04.summary: Generated 1 credit document request for the loan application. Applied strict relevance gate based on borrower profile - Veronica Montes has 715 FICO score with no credit events, no existing mortgages, and is purchasing (not renting). Only requested tri-merge credit report as required by NQMF guidelines. Did not request mortgage payment history (no existing mortgages), VOM/VOR (not applicable), credit event documentation (no events), tradeline supplement (715 FICO likely meets standard requirements), or fraud alert/dispute resolution documents (not flagged in scenario).

STEP_05.summary: Generated 4 property document requests based on single-family residence purchase scenario. Applied relevance gate to exclude investment property documents (Form 1007, rental schedules) since this is owner-occupied. Requested core property documents: comprehensive Appraisal Report with Form 1004 specifications supporting $411,000 purchase price and 80% LTV calculation, Flood Determination to establish FEMA zone requirements, Property Insurance with replacement cost coverage and proper mortgagee clause, and SSR/UCDP findings for appraisal review. Did not request Condo Questionnaire (SFR property), PUD documentation (not applicable), or investment-specific documents per strict relevance criteria.

specifications: Must identify subject property address at 4025 E WELDON AVE, Phoenix, AZ 85018
Must identify property type as Single Family Residence and unit count
Must show appraised value to support $411,000 purchase price
Must support LTV/CLTV calculation for $328,800 loan amount (80% LTV)
Must be dated within 365 days of Note date with recertification required if exceeding 120 days
Must include all pages and addenda
Must include Form 1004 (Uniform Residential Appraisal Form) for single-family residence
Must identify borrower Veronica Marie Montes and reconcile with loan file
Must disclose any repairs, adverse conditions, or inspection requirements
Must include comparable sales analysis and appraiser certification
Must include street map showing location of subject property and comparables used
Must include exterior building sketch with dimensions and floor plan sketch with gross living area calculations
Must include original color photographs of front, street, and rear views of subject property
Must include interior photos of kitchen, all bathrooms, main living area, and any areas with deterioration or improvements
Must include analysis of any sales/listings of subject property within 3 years
Must include completed Sales Comparison Approach section
Must include appraiser comments on any unfavorable conditions and market impact
Must include Certification and Statement of Limiting Conditions signed by appraiser
Must include copy of appraiser's Errors and Omissions Insurance Policy valid as of appraisal date
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for underwriting of $328,800 loan amount
LTV/CLTV eligibility verification depends on appraised value supporting $411,000 purchase price
Property type and unit count affect Flex Supreme program eligibility
Subject property identity must be consistent across loan file for borrower Veronica Marie Montes
NQMF guidelines require completed appraisal report for all loan transactions to assess property adequacy as collateral
Form 1004 is required appraisal form for single-family residential properties per guidelines
Comprehensive property documentation supports underwriting decision for purchase transaction

specifications: Must establish whether subject property at 4025 E WELDON AVE, Phoenix, AZ 85018 is located in FEMA Special Flood Hazard Area
Must be provided by Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA)

Accurate flood zone identification affects insurance requirements and loan terms

specifications: Must protect against fire, lightning, explosion, windstorm, hail, smoke, aircraft, vehicles, riot or civil commotion
Must include standard extended coverage endorsement with minimum required perils
Must provide replacement cost basis coverage (actual cash value not acceptable)
Must be effective for at least 60 days after funding date
Named insured must list Veronica Marie Montes as shown on note
Property address must be 4025 E WELDON AVE, Phoenix, AZ 85018 matching note/security instrument
Must include standard mortgagee clause (loss payable clause not acceptable)
Must require written notice to named insured and mortgagee before policy cancellation
Coverage amount must be adequate for property protection
Must include policy number, loan number, insurance company name, agent information
Must show effective and expiration dates, premium amount, coverage amounts and deductible
Must be signed and dated by insurance agent

NQMF guidelines mandate hazard insurance with specific coverage requirements and perils
Replacement cost coverage protects against property value depreciation in claims
Proper mortgagee clause ensures lender protection in event of property damage or loss
Coverage continuation requirements protect collateral throughout loan term

STEP_06.summary: Generated 2 title document requests for purchase transaction. Applied strict relevance gate based on scenario - this is a purchase (not refinance) so excluded payoff statements and mortgage statements. No HOA indicated in property description so excluded HOA documentation. No title exception requiring survey mentioned so excluded survey. Applied NQMF guidelines requiring title commitment to identify borrower/vested parties and all liens/exceptions, plus vesting deed to confirm ownership. Deferred insurance documents to Property module per cross-module deduplication rules.

specifications: Must identify borrower Veronica Marie Montes as vested party
Must identify subject property at 123 Oak Street, Los Angeles, CA
Must include complete legal description
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, exceptions, and title requirements
Must show title insurer name and effective date within acceptable recency window
Must confirm clear title or identify all encumbrances requiring resolution
Final vesting must reflect borrower name per NQMF guidelines
reasons_needed: Title must confirm Veronica Montes' ownership and insurable interest in subject property
Underwriter must review all title exceptions and lien position before loan approval
Required to verify property legal description matches loan application
Essential for determining closing conditions and title insurance requirements

specifications: Must show current ownership of 123 Oak Street, Los Angeles, CA property
Must identify grantor and grantee in chain of title
Must include legal description matching title commitment
Must be properly recorded with county recorder
Must confirm vesting aligns with borrower Veronica Marie Montes
Must be dated and notarized per state requirements
reasons_needed: Required to confirm property ownership and verify borrower has legal interest
Essential for underwriter to validate vesting matches loan application
Needed to establish chain of title for property being pledged as collateral

STEP_07.summary: Generated 0 compliance document requests after applying strict relevance gate. This is a clean owner-occupied purchase transaction with a U.S. citizen borrower using standard SSN, qualifying for Flex Supreme program with no business purpose, entity involvement, or special circumstances. All compliance triggers were evaluated: Business Purpose Affidavit not needed (owner-occupied), ITIN Documentation not needed (SSN borrower), Entity Documentation not needed (individual borrower), Employment Authorization not needed (U.S. citizen). Cross-cutting module already handles government ID and occupancy certification, avoiding duplication per module coordination rules.

STEP_08.summary: Successfully merged, ranked, and generated final output for 12 document requests from all modules. Applied merge logic based on document type and context with no duplicates found. Ranked documents by priority: 4 P0 critical documents (government ID, tax returns, 1099s, appraisal), 2 P1 high-priority items (bank statements, earnest money), and 6 P2 standard documents. All 12 documents have "needed" status indicating they are required for this loan scenario. Final output includes comprehensive scenario summary, conflict tracking, and statistical breakdown by category, priority, and status.
